title: SMA Active Leases
description: Soft locks across SMARCH-managed resources. Agents (human or model-driven) acquire a lease on a brick or regen-target before edits, and release it after. TTL-based so a crashed agent does not permanently block a resource. Runtime cache lives at SMA/registry/active-leases.generated.json and is intentionally ignored by git.

lease_id.description: Unique id for this lease. Format: lease-<unix-ms>-<8 hex>.

resource_id.description: Brick id, build id, regen target name (e.g. wiki/BRICK_WALL), etc.

project.description: Optional project scope. Required for project-local resources like backlog or import-lock.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the actor holding the lease. e.g. claude-opus-4-7@sess-abc, human@sma-operator.

intent.description: What the agent plans to do with this resource. Mandatory.

rationale.description: Why this work is happening now. Optional but encouraged.

force_acquired_from.description: If this lease was force-stolen, the prior lease_id.
